pi_items.source: Task instructions and verifier.py logic explicitly demand Latitude 82.5 N.
Task instructions and verifier.py logic explicitly demand Longitude 15.0 E.
Task instructions and verifier.py logic explicitly demand an Altitude of 0.
Verified via Wikipedia API that these are the true NORAD SATCAT IDs for NOAA-15, NOAA-18, and NOAA-19 respectively, matching the task's instructions and verifier logic.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions and verifier logic synthetically prescribe the RV Polarstern ground station coordinates to be Latitude 82.5 N, Longitude 15.0 E, and Altitude 0. External Wikipedia API queries confirm that the NORAD catalog numbers 25338, 28654, and 33591 correctly correspond to the real-world NOAA-15, NOAA-18, and NOAA-19 meteorological satellites requested by the task.
